# @tyravel/crypto

Post-quantum cryptography for Tyravel

## Install

```bash
npm install @tyravel/crypto
```

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Version | `1.0.3` |
| Source | [`packages/crypto`](https://github.com/thesimonharms/tyravel/tree/main/packages/crypto) |
| Category | Platform services |
| Node.js | `>=26` |
